scripts.dev: concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.format: npm run format -w frontend && npm run format -w backend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w frontend && npm run format:check -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
